programmes.show_description: In 2014, realtor Beverly Carter vanishes after a property viewing. Her body is later found, and police arrest Arron Lewis, a man with a violent past and clear intent.
A partnership formed through a mutual need to seek help for substance misuse. But the troubled lovers were doomed, with attacks on each other culminating in an alcohol-fuelled frenzy.
Two ladies keep Dr Dev Shah busy: one has a large lipoma on her back, the other a cyst on her forehead. 19-year-old Abby hopes Dr Natalia Spierings can rid her of lumps on her ears.
When dreams turn into plastic surgery nightmares.
Challengers 'Jay's Virtual Quiz' take on the Eggheads. The team is named after a virtual pub quiz of the same name. (Ep1)
A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear a noise inside.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Visit Thane.tv and browse our selection of award winning home and fitness products that let you do more with less!
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Meet Sheffield-born Mark - aka Ruby Rox - one of Benidorm's top entertainers, who's getting himself stage ready with a series of gruelling cross-fit classes.
Wayne and husband Des are cooking up hearty meals to give to the local homeless community. The charitable couple also show us their next project: refurbishing a womens' refuge centre.
In Newton Abbot, a pensioner is shopping when a woman takes an envelope of money from her. In Coventry, Mal spots a suspected drug user who already has a lifetime ban. (Ep11)
The traffic cops of north Yorkshire are back, and in this episode drug drivers are responsible for a number of highly dangerous incidents. Hosted by Jamie Theakston.
Fifteen miles south of York, a prolific car thief crashes and rolls a stolen car at over 100mph. In Harrogate, the hunt for a disqualified driver leads to a high-speed pursuit.
Near York, a young driver in a stolen car is on a suspected high behind the wheel. The police must make a move before the reckless man can join a busy motorway and cause more mayhem.
Observational documentary series. The high-speed pursuit specialists of Cumbria tackle a runaway knifeman, an overturned trailer full of cows and a ruptured gas main.
Duncan receives a shock when a cyclist who has been crushed and trapped under a car turns out to be someone he knows.
Cumbria's interceptor teams are called out to deal with a suspected gunman, a pedestrian under a car and to destroy a cannabis farm.
A serial scammer attempts to make identical travel insurance claims and a caravan owner claims for a theft that never happened.
Levi talks some sense into Remi. Lacey opens up to Holden. Cash is forced to lie to his wife.
Cash doubles down on his lie. Sonny snaps at Dana. Kerrie resorts to some of her old tricks.
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. Candid interviews with the staff reveal first-hand that medical professionals need healthcare too.
Nurse Hannah is running Barnsley casualty, but she faces an extra challenge: a shortage of the porters who keep patients moving through the department and free up the bays.
A man has been crushed by a forklift truck and sustained a serious leg injury, and a 22-year-old woman is trapped in her car with a badly injured ankle after a high-speed collision.
The team at Hull Royal Infirmary has another busy night: a man is involved in a motorbike collision with a deer and a young patient is in agony with his ankle facing the wrong way.
Dr Toby is spellbound by his patient, Gideon, Preston's part-time witch, and Dr Natalia Spierings tries to help a young woman with a scalp condition usually found in middle-aged men.
This episode looks at the dangerous obsession with surgery that often goes hand in hand with a rise to fame.
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. Jeanette has resorted to smoking marijuana to help alleviate her chronic pain.
A fire alarm begins evacuation efforts; a man with potential spine injuries is given pain relief while waiting for scan results.
Dr Natalia Spierings helps Justin who has a genetic condition which means his skin is covered in lumps made up of nerves. Dr Dev Shah is asked to remove a cyst named Egbert.
Challengers 'Anything Will Do' take on the Eggheads. The group were two separate pub quiz teams until they became friends, and then decided to form a single team. (Ep3)
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Visit Thane.tv and browse our selection of award winning home and fitness products that let you do more with less!
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Retired estate agent Fiona now spends her time helping out her local dog charity ADANA. Wedding planner Louise is grafting hard to dress a church for a couple's big day.
Keith and his family run a butcher's shop catering to Brits in a village near the holiday hotspot of Alicante. And we meet up with Yorkshire-born chip shop owner 'John the Fish'.
At West Orchards, Paige receives an SOS from a new store that a dastardly duo are back. And Farrah is on the case of a pair who work together to hit a small convenience store. (Ep12)
Drink-driving, drug use and atrocious weather all contribute to cases for the Traffic Cops, including one coke-snorting driver who gets arrested twice in quick succession.
Near York, a young man who's stolen his grandfather's car leads the police into a bizarre and dangerous pursuit that ends in a trip to hospital for the youngster.
Near York, officers arrest a car full of suspects with a large haul of drugs, heading for a music festival. Plus, a reckless driver with a history of violence tries to outrun the cops.
A serial offender gives the Cumbrian officers the runaround and a high-speed pursuit comes to a painful finish.
The interceptors smash down a door to save a man's life, and a fleeing Land Rover rams two cop cars in a bid to get away.
The Cumbrian interceptors tackle a woman trapped inside a burning car, a bad boy racer, a bullock breakout and drink-related incidents on Black Eye Friday.
A couple go on the run when their claim of being burgled at knifepoint is exposed as fraud. Pub CCTV cameras show a cyclist taking a brewery for a ride.
Cash doubles down on his lie. Sonny snaps at Dana. Kerrie resorts to some of her old tricks.
Harper shuts Kerrie out. Sonny gets a reality check. Levi admits he needs a change.
Documentary series. The doctors deal with a woman in the midst of a panic attack, a chronic asthmatic, a man who can only eat eggs and a harrowing diagnosis of stomach cancer.
Nursing staff have called in sick at Barnsley Hospital and the team is under pressure as patient numbers are rising. A patient in extreme pain needs immediate treatment.
A man and his dangerous dogs have terrorised locals for months. Officers put a specialist team together to bring the owner and his animals in - but it leads to a tense stand-off. (Ep3)
Seventeen-year-old Dougie is rushed in by helicopter after a mountain bike accident leaves him with a catastrophic head injury. A scan shows his brain is bleeding.
